blended.narrative: Stoneham is expecting flurries over the next 48 hours with trace amounts. Snow levels around 3,684 ft. Looking ahead, 21 inches possible over the next 14 days.

daily_summary.narrative: Wednesday: 3.8" of snow, highs of 45°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Thursday: 12" of heavy snow, highs of 30°F. Expect variable conditions.
Saturday: 2.1" of snow, highs of 30°F. Expect variable conditions.
